name: Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF

name: Schwab US Dividend Equity ETF
description: High-quality US dividend payers. Lower volatility, higher income.

description: US stocks screened for environmental, social, and governance criteria.

name: Vanguard Total International Stock ETF
description: Broad international equity — developed and emerging markets combined.

name: Vanguard Emerging Markets ETF
description: Higher-risk equities from developing economies — China, India, Brazil.

description: Developed markets only (Europe, Australasia, Far East) — excludes US and EM.

name: Vanguard Information Technology ETF
description: Concentrated tech exposure — Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia. High growth, high volatility.

name: Vanguard Health Care ETF
description: Healthcare sector — pharma, biotech, medical devices. Defensive growth.

name: Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF
description: Broad US investment-grade bonds — government and corporate.

name: Vanguard Total International Bond ETF
description: International investment-grade bonds, hedged to USD.

name: Vanguard Short-Term Inflation-Prot ETF
description: Inflation-protected treasuries. Returns adjust with CPI.

name: Vanguard Short-Term Treasury ETF
description: Near cash equivalent — very low risk, short-term US government bonds.

name: Vanguard Real Estate ETF
description: US real estate investment trusts — office, residential, industrial.

name: SPDR Gold Shares
description: Physical gold. Classic hedge against inflation and geopolitical risk.

name: Invesco Optimum Yield Diversified Cmdty

name: Invesco QQQ Trust

name: ARK Innovation ETF
